center.name: 博爾德 (科羅拉多州)
center.summary: 博爾德 (科羅拉多州)是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Black-billed magpie，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The black-billed magpie (Pica hudsonia), also known as the American magpie, is a bird in the corvid family found in the western half of North America

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The black-billed magpie (Pica hudsonia), also known as the American magpie, is a bird in the corvid family found in the western half of North America
